source_desc: W3C Data Privacy Vocabulary (DPV) AI Extension v2.3

enums.name: AITechnique
enums.doc: AI technique types from the W3C Data Privacy Vocabulary (DPV) AI extension. Use for annotating the machine learning or AI technique used in a model — maps to the SPDX 3 ai_typeOfModel field.

enums.name: AICapability
enums.doc: AI capability types from the W3C Data Privacy Vocabulary (DPV) AI extension. Use for annotating the capabilities or outputs of an AI system — maps to the SPDX 3 ai_domain field.

enums.name: AILifecycleStage
enums.doc: AI lifecycle stages from the W3C Data Privacy Vocabulary (DPV) AI extension. Use for annotating which stage of the AI development or operation pipeline a piece of code or data belongs to.

enums.name: AISystemType
enums.doc: AI system classification types from the W3C Data Privacy Vocabulary (DPV) AI extension. Use for annotating the broad category or architecture of an AI system.
